x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that creates, maintains, and offers the banking product listed in the product directory.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Manager or Product Owner
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person responsible for defining, managing, and updating the product information and features in the directory.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that uses, purchases, or subscribes to the banking product or service.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that ensure product information, terms, and offerings comply with banking regulations and consumer protection laws.
